they need.

## Pack info

- **Pack id:** <!-- e.g. catlock -->
- **Game:** <!-- e.g. deadlock -->
- **Variants included:** <!-- e.g. normal, gloat -->

## Source

<!-- Where did the artwork come from? Link to the original mod / artist if applicable. -->

## License

<!-- Restate the license you put in pack.json. The pack will not be merged
     without an explicit license. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pack.json` validates against `schemas/pack.schema.json`.
- [ ] At least one variant is provided (VPK extraction *or* `icons-extra/`).
- [ ] Credits in `pack.json` name every contributor and link to their work.
- [ ] License field in `pack.json` is explicit.
- [ ] I have rights to distribute these assets, or they are mine.
